docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60908539) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DEPUTY SHERIFFS' ASSOCIATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, PURSUANT TO AN EX PARTE APPLICATION ON JUNE 21, 2017, THIS MATTER IS ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR A STATUS REPORT IN ADVANCE OF A SEPTEMBER 14, 2017 HEARING TO DETERMINE VALIDITY OF ELECTIONS. COUNSEL REPORTS THAT THERE IS NOTHING TO REPORT IN THE INTERIM. THIS ACTION REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET FOR HEARING TO DETERMINE VALIDITY OF ELECTIONS ON SEPTEMBER 14, 2017 AT 9:30 AM IN COURTROOM 302. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-14-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DETERMINE VALIDITY OF ELECTIONS. THE CAUSE IS ARGUED AND SUBMITTED BY BOTH SIDES. WILL PROCEED TO HEARING ON OCTOBER 30, 2017 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. A BRIEFING SHDEDULE IS SET. THE PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE MOVING PAPERS BY OCTOBER 5, 2017. OPPOSITION SHALL BE FILED BY OCTOBER 16, 2017. A REPLY, IF ANY, IS DUE BY OCTOBER 23, 2017. calendar.matters:
MOTION And Hearing On Petition And Complaint To Determine Validity Of Elections And For Other Relief
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Katzebach, Esq. (415-834-1778) of Katzenback Law Offices for Plaintiff.
Vance Piggot, Esq. (916-646-2860) of Rains Lucia Stern St. Phalle & Silver P.C. for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces Plaintiff waited too long to bring the motion. The Court orders parties to meet, confer on the only issues re: ballot boxes and agree on an order that will deal with the ballot box situation for the future.

10:53 am. The matter is recalled. Defendant reads the stipulation of the parties on the record.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling with an exception as follows:

PLAINTIFF KENNETH LOMBA's MOTION And Hearing On Petition And Complaint To Determine Validity Of Elections And For Other Relief is Denied on all portions of the motion except on the portion relating to ballot boxes. The parties stipulation is read on the record. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Respondent to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)

Hearing Hearing After Ex Parte Application To Determine Validity Of Elections
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Katzenbach, Esq. (415-834-1778) of Katzenback Law Offices for Plaintiff.
Vance Piggot, Esq. (916-646-2860) of Rains Lucia Stern St. Phalle & Silver P.C. for Defendant.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing After Ex Parte Application To Determine Validity Of Elections is Off calendar. This application has been superseded by the later filed motion to determine validity of elections and for other relief.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)

Hearing Hearing After Ex Parte Application To Determine Validity Of Elections
Off Calendar Sep-14-2017 Continued To Oct-30-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher W. Katzenbach of the law offices of Katzenbach Law Offices (415-834-1778) appears as counsel for plaintiff

Attorney, Vance Piggott of the law offices of Rains Lucia Stern St. Phalle & Silver PC (916-646-2860) appears as counsel for defendant

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

Plaintiff's Motion to Determine Validity Of Elections will proceed to hearing on October 30, 2017 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. A briefing shdedule is set. The plaintiff shall file moving papers by October 5, 2017. Opposition shall be filed by October 16, 2017. A reply, if any, is due by October 23, 2017.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Angie Diner, CSR No: 9581, email: adiner@sftc.org. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2017 Off Calendar

Status Report In Advance Of September 14, 2017 Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Vance Piggott of the law offices of Rains Lucia Stern St. Phalle & Silver PC (916-646-2860) appears as counsel for defendant, San Francisco Sheriff's Association

No other appearance is made in this matter

Pursuant to an ex parte application on June 21, 2017, this matter is added to calendar for a status report in advance of a September 14, 2017 hearing TO DETERMINE VALIDITY OF ELECTIONS. Counsel reports that there is nothing to report in the interim. This action remains as previously set for HEARING TO DETERMINE VALIDITY OF ELECTIONS on September 14, 2017 at 9:30 AM in Courtroom 302.
